recentTweets.text:
Hey hey 👋🏽 I’ve never been very good at Twitter, often forgetting that it exists. Sorry journos who remain ride or die through buyouts & rebrands 🤷🏽‍♀️

If you’re on 🔵Sky, find me there, same handle. Am also on that app (& many others) on my official side @ RepEmilyRandall 

xo ER
House Dems stand with our leadership.

Flying home for more town halls— but if the Senate holds the line and rejects this dangerous CR I’ll hop back on a plane. 

People deserve a clean stopgap funding bill that keeps gov’t open, doesn’t do more damage, and gives us the space to negotiate a bipartisan budget solution.
This is bad for rural Americans across the country, and feels like a blatant attack on states like Washington and Oregon who long ago legalized universal vote-by-mail.
❤️🧡💛💚💙💜🩷🩵🤍🤎 You cant forget the Q 🏳️‍🌈 https://t.co/LpcRm1Z42D
"Historic first: Washington state senator is first queer Latina in Congress" https://t.co/4WnYvBf975 @KING5Seattle #WA06
#APRaceCall: Democrat Emily Randall wins election to U.S. House in Washington’s 6th Congressional District https://t.co/IZ2GqhKt9t #WA06

.@TheAdvocateMag: "Emily Randall makes history as first LGBTQ+ Latina in Congress" 

More: https://t.co/LYLmK25yZO #WA06

.@thehill: "Randall becomes first woman, LGBTQ person to represent Washington’s 6th district" 

Read on: https://t.co/tolVywkWhl #WA06

We won!

We currently lead with 57% of the vote — and last night, Sen. @DrewMacEwen called to concede our race.

Emily Randall is now the Congresswoman-elect from Washington’s 6th District.

Our full message: https://t.co/GPH3dof5Mu #WA06 #WAElex

— Team Emily

"In Washington state, another state senator could make history. Democrat Emily Randall has the chance to become the first out LGBTQ+ Latina member of Congress."

More from @allisondetzel: https://t.co/fUg2jEetha #WA06 #WAelex
Thank you to all our incredible volunteers! #WA06 @washdems #WAelex https://t.co/b1M1JuKTwQ

It was an honor to speak at the Women’s March for Humanity in Sequim! 

Read more from the @SequimGazette: https://t.co/jqnTVc7e4b #WA06
BREAKING: The @SeattleTimes endorses Emily Randall for Congress in Washington's 6th District! https://t.co/zemCYiZdJK #WA06 https://t.co/pUsJIMnDPM
Thank you @VoteNewDems for your support! #WA06 @AnnMcLaneKuster https://t.co/Y1kWiSpogl https://t.co/lt3orUh9xc
🩺@DrKimSchrier has joined Team Emily! Thank you for your endorsement. #WA06 https://t.co/XclbrqmfOe
Thank you Senator @MariaCantwell for your support! Together, we'll ✅hold the Senate AND ✅flip the House. #WA06 https://t.co/qdsNPHWFaJ

This campaign has always been about ✨community✨ I’m so proud of my staff and the volunteers who got us to this point!

(Quick housekeeping note: Team Emily is taking over this account! Tweets from me personally will be signed —ER) https://t.co/ZZlPCVN8Uy

Port Angeles = sweeping views of the Olympics + the Salish Sea, scenic (+ collaboratively funded) bike infrastructure, civically engaged community, and an incredible community college. Come back again so we can prove you wrong! xo, the next member of Congress for PA/WA06. https://t.co/h5mlInK8zx

A week or 2 ago I heard Gov @Tim_Walz give remarks about the dangers of toxic masculinity — and that’s the kind of man I want as a leader. A dad whose son knows that it’s safe to cry with him. A teacher & coach who stands with his LGBTQ students. A man you’d choose over the bear.
As a former Bostonian (thanks to @Wellesley College and my wife), I’ve been a big fan of @MayorWu from 3,000 miles away. It was so fun to run into her at the @DNC Convention! https://t.co/paxB5uolIh
Ready to block and tackle for our freedom, Coach @Tim_Walz ! https://t.co/7Jvt3v7H6o
Excited to serve with you!
Caught by my constituent getting from here to there in a fun and eco-friendly way!
Grateful for all @emilyslist does to elect women. We won together in 2018 and 2022 — here’s to big wins for pro-choice women in November!!

Happy anniversary to Alison & me 👩🏼‍❤️‍💋‍👩🏽 It’s been one year as ✨married ladies✨ and I’m so grateful to be together on this wild adventure of life. Thanks for choosing me every day, my love 💖 https://t.co/MnmooNUOiL

I know you mean this in a not-so-nice way, but let me tell you: @girlscouts troop leaders are incredible — organized, inspiring, role models and mentors to girls who go on to do amazing things themselves.
HUGE NEWS! I'm advancing to the November general election! 🎉🎉Thank YOU from the bottom of my heart for supporting my campaign. Onwards to the general election! #WAprimary https://t.co/VPzf9PtqQe
Your vote is your voice, and the results aren’t official until each and every vote is counted, but I’m feeling so so proud of all the work our team has done over the last nine months. Thank you 💙 2/2

Big night over here at Team Emily HQ ‼️

Grateful for volunteers who knocked, called & texted tens of thousands of voters; grateful for 6,800 donors who supported our campaign $25 @ a time; grateful for the 37,441 voters (& counting!) who cast ballots for me in this primary. 1/2 https://t.co/u0EgQ6x5v4

Honored & humbled to have powerhouse endorsements from Sen. @PattyMurray, Former Gov. Christine Gregoire, and Former @GovGaryLocke! Primary Election Day is less than a week away, so don’t forget to mail in your ballots or drop them off at a drop box. We're so close!! 🗳️ https://t.co/o64i5Zi0Wq

What a heartbreaking loss — for our community, for local journalism, for the fight for a well-informed electorate. Sending love and light to his wife and children, and all who loved Matt and read his words.

https://t.co/1n1Lm63iNj

Endlessly grateful for Presiden Biden’s leadership in office, and in making this decision to put the country first. And proud as hell to support Madam @VP @KamalaHarris to be our next President!!! https://t.co/saKHgS279h

I'm honored to receive the endorsement of the Tacoma News Tribune!! "We were won over by Randall’s history of sticking her neck out and doing what’s right." - @thenewstribune #WA06 https://t.co/KdPiEI2HMI

Former Gov. Gregoire has been a trailblazer, breaking barriers as WA's first female Attorney General and leading our state for 8 years as Governor. I'm proud to have her endorsement! https://t.co/lKxaFECtQF

Honored to receive the sole endorsement of the Washington State Labor Council, AFL-CIO's 2024 Committee on Political Education. I'm proud to be the labor candidate in this race - I will never stop fighting for working families. @WAAFLCIO 1/2

Honored to be endorsed by @katieporteroc - a champion for regular people. When my little sister was born with complex disabilities, my family's access to Medicaid improved her quality of life without bankrupting us. In Congress, I'll work hard for families like yours & mine. https://t.co/pCUTSJMygD
I’m honored to be the only candidate in this race endorsed by the national League of Conservation Voters Action Fund!

Washington’s 6th has incredible natural beauty - from the Olympics to the South Sound, our communities know we must combat climate change and protect public lands.

I'm honored to be the only candidate for WA06 endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund. @LCVoters https://t.co/42f4ZTlLUM

I grew up in a hardworking Union household - now I am running for Congress to keep fighting for good Union jobs for working families.

That's why I'm so proud to receive the sole endorsement of Machinists District 751, one of the largest, most influential unions in WA state! 💪🏽🎉 https://t.co/yScRcfSeap

Representation isn’t just symbolic. Having queer and trans people in office – at all levels – saves lives.

I am running to be the first-ever LGBTQ+ Latina in Congress - and I am thrilled to be endorsed by Human Rights Campaign. Thank you @HRC 💪🏽🎉

In @Politico this AM - It's rare for U.S. Senators to make endorsements in competitive primaries. Senator Murray has endorsed our campaign because she knows that when I join her in DC, I’ll be a partner in the work she’s been dedicated to: helping people and solving problems. https://t.co/Utxii5wqds

In @PunchbowlNews this morning - I'm honored to receive Senator Patty Murray's endorsement in my race for U.S. Congress!

No one understands the importance of going to DC to fight for families like Sen. Murray. I'm so proud to have her in my corner. https://t.co/2T3SY4MyF2

Scooped by @politico - Rep. Strickland & Rep. Gluesenkamp Perez announced their endorsement of my campaign! Marilyn and Marie know what it's like to be underestimated and win tough fights. I’m so proud to have powerhouse leaders in my corner. 💪🏽@MGPforCongress @StricklandforWA https://t.co/k2eMS5PYkx

BIG news 🌟 I’ve just been endorsed by @PPact!
I’ve been so proud to fight together to expand #healthcareaccess & defend #reproductivefreedom here in this WA & to have Planned Parenthood Action on #TeamEmily as we take our fight to Congress. 💪🏽 #abortionrights https://t.co/3wLLTJQOrf

Here’s what’s on my mind in Olympia:
➡️Fighting for reproductive freedom and abortion care.
➡️Strengthening our healthcare system.
➡️Securing housing solutions.
➡️Investing in education. https://t.co/pbogIDv3e8

Exciting news, friends! The next step on my road to Congress is here – my new website!
Born and raised right here on the Peninsula, this community is my heart and the reason behind my run. https://t.co/pOXT5KOcFW https://t.co/NDDZyebXky

Scooped by @Politico, but I'm thrilled to share the news first-hand! 🎉 Our campaign is gaining incredible momentum, raising $225,000 in just the first six weeks. A massive shoutout to our grassroots supporters – your enthusiasm is driving this movement forward! https://t.co/Ws41Nm2tJy
Happy Thanksgiving from my family to yours! 🦃 https://t.co/aD8sLaL2yh

I'm honored to be endorsed by @TeamLPAC, and will be proud to be WA's first openly LGBTQ+ member of Congress. Representation isn’t just symbolic. Having queer and trans people in office saves lives! 🏳️‍🌈 https://t.co/ndQgUMHktd

Humbled to announce the endorsement of WA Secretary of State, Steve Hobbs! I am grateful to have served alongside @electhobbs in the State Senate, and honored to have his support in this congressional campaign! https://t.co/le6Apz3B8h

“Sen. Emily Randall of the state's 26th Legislative District announced Thursday that she will run for Congress to represent the Sixth Congressional District, a week after Rep. Derek Kilmer said he won't seek reelection in 2024.” - Kitsap Sun
https://t.co/nVJ5BGEWbO

Some personal news: I’m running for Congress in #WA06! Raised in a union household in Port Orchard, I've fought for lower healthcare costs & safe communities as a State Senator. Now, I'm taking that fight to D.C. Chip in to join our people-powered campaign:https://t.co/9pDnBT4xPg https://t.co/PytWWeJnke

Telling our stories, showing up as our truest selves, is a powerful way to make to world more welcoming. Grateful for the opportunity to show up as *me*  in my community, the Senate, and in @teenvogue 🏳️‍🌈 #RepresentationMatters #LGBTQ #Queer #WALeg https://t.co/ItSf3MPq2h

Happy #SiblingDay 👩🏽👦🏾👧🏻

It may be a silly made up social media holiday, but it’s as good an excuse as any to celebrate having the best brother in the world, remember what it was like to be three of us, and commemorate this peak 90s #drip💙 https://t.co/36V750RXwx
Officially sworn in again as a member of the Washington State Senate! 🙋🏽‍♀️ https://t.co/MYhPk9bSxt
To you & yours — may the final days of 2022 be full of warmth & love, laughter & quiet moments of reflection, & the promise of new, longer, more light-filled days ahead. https://t.co/3eE8o70ypc

🏛️some professional news🏛️

With the unanimous support of my colleagues, I’ve been elected by the Senate Democratic Caucus to serve as Deputy Majority Leader for the 2022-2023 biennium 💁🏽‍♀️ 1/2 https://t.co/cjE8ynLgX9

Even with a few more votes to count, the numbers are clear: I’ll be returning to the State Senate for another term! Thank you 💙

From the start, our work’s been fueled by community. By you, my neighbors. Together we can do amazing things.

Here’s to the continued work ahead 💙 https://t.co/KhWTpndwFf

kurdistanMentions.text: #TeamEmily (friends from junior high, former teachers, neighbors from the 23rd, Machinists & Congressman Derek Kilmer) brought the energy to knocking on doors🚪in Bremerton today! 🙌🏽 Ballots’re due in just 10 days—please VOTE 🗳 #grassroots #flipthe26th #bluewave https://t.co/AczbiVhKZ3

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 1 Kurdistan Lens tweet hit for Emily Randall. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. ICYMI: #TacomaNarrowsBridge tolls got 75 cents cheaper on Oct 1st — just in time for your Monday #morningcommute 🚙🚌 

Read some of the @gigharbornow coverage to learn more!

#roadsandbridges #infrastructure #moveaheadwashington #localgovernment #transportationequity #pnw #waleg https://t.co/6tIBRTnfpf

53% 🥳

Feeling so much joy & gratitude this morning. Our incredible primary night results prove hard work—knocking nearly 13k doors, making 3k + calls— pays off. The results also tell me our neighbors want reasonable, effective leadership who will champion repro rights. https://t.co/WzfXEmlHlj

SCOTUS struck down Roe v Wade. Though we knew this day was coming, it’s no less heartbreaking or infuriating.

Let that fury & heartbreak fuel you in the work ahead—to organize, to VOTE.

Because elections got us here. And winning elections is how we win back our freedom.
Happy #PrideMonth 🌈 from our queer family to you ❤️🧡💛💚💙💜💖 https://t.co/sK9Aq0dj0g

As a former @PPFA / @PPact staff member, I’m committed to fighting alongside providers & patients, community members & electeds & @PPAAWest to make WA a better place to live and plan families—on our own terms. 1/ https://t.co/d5a5riPU4j

Happy Filing Week! I’m *officially* a candidate for WA State Senate y’all 🙌🏾
